params.StackDescription: Until end of turn, {p:Targeted} can target CARDNAME as though it didn't have shroud.
params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, CARDNAME can be the target of spells and abilities controlled by target player as though it didn't have shroud.
params.TgtPrompt: Select target player to be able to target CARDNAME
